docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-12-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-14-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506 NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-14-2013 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER GRANTING JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTON OF JUDGMENT - FULLY SATISFIED
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AMD JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT TERRANOVA, ANN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY METHVEN, BRUCE AS TO DEFENDANT TERRANOVA, ANN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF AUTOMATIC STAY (RE:REQUEST FOR ARBITRATION OF ATTORNEY FEES & COSTS) FILED BY DEFENDANT TERRANOVA, ANN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 89.50 - SERVED APR-14-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TERRANOVA, ANN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-14-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-14-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF METHVEN, BRUCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TERRANOVA, ANN $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $164.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,164.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
